name: PHASE-40 C2 deferral(a) close (NEGATIVE control): ambient active project 'phase40_a' (NO ctx.active_project_id), fs.write_file into another project's dir MUST be DENIED SCOPE_CROSS_PROJECT
_phase40_note: Proves the ctx-less cross-project write hole is closed. The active project is established via the policy's AMBIENT register (scenario.active_project -> policy.setActiveProject), NOT ctx.active_project_id, so this exercises exactly the path PHASE-36 left inert (deferral (a)). RED before the PHASE-40 fix (the write SUCCEEDS because no ctx id is present), GREEN after (the ambient register supplies the active reference). Contrast S330 (own-project write ALLOWED) + S331 (null-ambient creation carve-out ALLOWED).
